mapper.sql:
FROM ( SELECT TT.CTKEY , TT.CTNAME , TT.OWKEY , TT.OWNAME , TT.ICKEY , TT.ICNAME , TT.SPEC , TT.IVATKEY , TT.ATTRIBUTE2 , TT.ATTRIBUTE3 , TT.PRODUCTLOT , SUM(TT.QTY) AS QTY , (CASE WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'Y' AND COALESCE(SUM(SN_WGT), 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(SUM(SN_WGT), 0) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT > 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT > 0 THEN (SUM(TT.QTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT > 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT = 0 THEN (SUM(TT.QTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT = 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT > 0 THEN (SUM(TT.QTY) * TT.AVG_WGT) ELSE 0 END) AS WGT , (SUM(TT.QTY) * TT.AVG_WGT) AS NET_WGT , (SUM(TT.QTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) AS SPEC_SUM_WGT , COALESCE(SUM(SN_WGT), 0) AS WGTING , COALESCE(CASE TT.PLTQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (SUM(TT.QTY) / TT.PLTQTY) END, 0) AS PLT_SUM_QTY , COALESCE(TT.PLTQTY, 0) AS PLTQTY , SUM(TT.AVQTY) AS AVQTY , (CASE WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'Y' AND COALESCE(SUM(SN_WGT), 0) > 0 THEN COALESCE(SUM(SN_WGT), 0) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT > 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT > 0 THEN (SUM(TT.AVQTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT > 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT = 0 THEN (SUM(TT.AVQTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) WHEN WGT_CF_YN = 'N' AND TT.SPEC_WGT = 0 AND TT.AVG_WGT > 0 THEN (SUM(TT.AVQTY) * TT.AVG_WGT) ELSE 0 END) AS AVWGT , (SUM(TT.AVQTY) * TT.AVG_WGT) AS AV_NET_WGT , (SUM(TT.AVQTY) * TT.SPEC_WGT) AS AV_SPEC_SUM_WGT , TT.UOM , TT.SPEC_WGT , TT.AVG_WGT , TT.WGT_UOM , TT.IBCONFIRMDATE , TT.PRODUCTDATE , TT.EXPIREDATE , TT.UDF2 AS LOGGRPCD , TT.WGT_CF_YN , TT.ZNKEY , TT.ZNNAME FROM (SELECT A.CTKEY , I.CTNAME , C.OWNAME , A.OWKEY , D.ICNAME , A.ICKEY , D.SPEC , A.IVATKEY , A.ATTRIBUTE2 , A.ATTRIBUTE3 , A.PRODUCTLOT , SUM(B.TTQTY) AS QTY , SUM(B.AVQTY) AS AVQTY , D.UOM , B.ULCKEY -- , (SELECT SUM(AMEUGDEV.FN_GET_BACODE_PARS (E.BRANDKEY, SERIAL_NO)) -- FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULCXBOX -- WHERE OWKEY = A.OWKEY -- AND CTKEY = A.CTKEY -- AND IVATKEY = A.IVATKEY -- AND ICKEY = A.ICKEY -- AND ULCKEY = B.ULCKEY) AS SN_WGT , 0 AS SN_WGT , D.PLTQTY , (D.WEIGHT / 1000) AS SPEC_WGT , CASE A.NET_WGT WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (CASE A.CFQTY WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE (A.NET_WGT / A.CFQTY) END) END AS AVG_WGT , 'KG' AS WGT_UOM , RPAD(SUBSTR(A.IBCONFIRMDATE, 1, 8), 14, 0) AS IBCONFIRMDATE , RPAD(SUBSTR (A.PRODUCTDATE, 1, 8), 14, 0) AS PRODUCTDATE , RPAD(SUBSTR (A.EXPIREDATE, 1, 8), 14, 0) AS EXPIREDATE , D.UDF2 , D.WGT_CF_YN , G.ZNKEY , H.ZNNAME FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT A , TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC B , TWORK_MST_LC F , TWORK_MST_AR G , TWORK_MST_ZN H , TWORK_MST_OW C , TWORK_MST_IC D LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICXBRAND E ON D.BRANDKEY = E.BRANDKEY , TWORK_MST_CT I WHERE A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.ICKEY = B.ICKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY AND A.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND B.LCKEY = F.LCKEY AND A.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND F.ARKEY = G.ARKEY AND A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND G.ZNKEY = H.ZNKEY AND A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY AND A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = D.ICKEY AND A.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND B.TTQTY > 0 GROUP BY A.CTKEY , I.CTNAME , A.OWKEY , C.OWNAME , A.CTKEY , D.ICNAME , A.ICKEY , D.SPEC , A.IVATKEY , A.ATTRIBUTE2 , A.ATTRIBUTE3 , A.PRODUCTLOT , B.ULCKEY , D.UOM , D.PLTQTY , D.WEIGHT , A.NET_WGT , A.CFQTY , SUBSTR(A.IBCONFIRMDATE, 1, 8) , SUBSTR(A.PRODUCTDATE, 1, 8) , SUBSTR(A.EXPIREDATE, 1, 8) , D.UDF2 , D.WGT_CF_YN , E.BRANDKEY , G.ZNKEY , H.ZNNAME) TT GROUP BY TT.CTKEY , TT.CTNAME , TT.OWNAME , TT.OWKEY , TT.ICNAME , TT.ICKEY , TT.SPEC , TT.IVATKEY , TT.ATTRIBUTE2 , TT.ATTRIBUTE3 , TT.PRODUCTLOT , TT.UOM , TT.SPEC_WGT , TT.AVG_WGT , TT.WGT_UOM , TT.IBCONFIRMDATE , TT.PRODUCTDATE , TT.EXPIREDATE , TT.UDF2 , TT.PLTQTY , TT.WGT_CF_YN , TT.ZNKEY , TT.ZNNAME ) A
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select:
/* wms-report-invnxsearchproperty-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnXSearchPropertyList */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT A.CTKEY , A.CTNAME , A.OWKEY , A.OWNAME , A.ICKEY , A.ICNAME , A.SPEC , A.IVATKEY , A.ATTRIBUTE2 , A.ATTRIBUTE3 , A.PRODUCTLOT , A.QTY , A.WGT , A.NET_WGT , A.SPEC_SUM_WGT , A.WGTING , A.PLT_SUM_QTY , A.PLTQTY , A.AVQTY , A.AVWGT , A.AV_NET_WGT , A.AV_SPEC_SUM_WGT , A.UOM , A.SPEC_WGT , A.AVG_WGT , A.WGT_UOM , A.IBCONFIRMDATE , A.PRODUCTDATE , A.EXPIREDATE , A.LOGGRPCD , A.WGT_CF_YN , A.ZNKEY , A.ZNNAME
ORDER BY A.CTKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , A.IBCONFIRMDATE , A.ATTRIBUTE3 , A.PRODUCTLOT #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
